prescreen: i18n key-parity test green · CJK 0 leakage in en · every new visual traces to a ledger event or domain vector (invariant 14) · leavability round-trip test green
axisB: H1 数据诚实 data-honesty — every visual is a data transcription (inv. 10/14)

H4 密度·节奏 density & rhythm — legible at 30 and at 700 islands
H5 双语对等 bilingual parity — zh-CN/en equals, load-bearing terms follow the glossary

H2 domain researcher founding an island

notes: Generic exporter emits Foundations from tokens.css only (cards:[] — components are SVG-React, not HTML markup, so component/pattern specimens are produced by SSR render + hand-authored NEW-dimension cards instead; graduate to a bespoke SSR exporter when v2 proves long-lived). Truth source has a second :root block (--fi-domain-* colors) the generic regex skips; those surface in the climate specimen card.
